mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_access_logs WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_access_logs WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE AND is_stranger = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_alerts WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0) END FROM rental_devices
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_houses WHERE status = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_residents WHERE status = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_devices WHERE status = '0'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_devices WHERE status != '0' OR status IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_alerts WHERE TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_alerts WHERE TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AND status = '2'

SELECT h.district, h.address as houseAddress, COUNT(*) as count FROM rental_access_logs l LEFT JOIN rental_houses h ON l.house_id = h.id WHERE l.is_stranger = '1' AND l.create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY h.district, h.address ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN '0%' ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental_alerts WHERE TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')), 0), '%') END as rate, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM AVG(handle_time - create_time)) / 3600 as avgTime FROM rental_alerts WHERE TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') GROUP BY status
SELECT town_street as townStreet, COUNT(*) as count FROM rental_houses WHERE status = '1' GROUP BY town_street ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT overall_level as overallLevel, COUNT(*) as count FROM rental_houses WHERE status = '1' GROUP BY overall_level ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM rental_access_logs WHERE create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT #{months}

SELECT TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM rental_alerts WHERE create_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT #{months}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN alert_level = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as serious, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN alert_level = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as moderate, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN alert_level = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as mild FROM rental_alerts WHERE TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM')
